programme.title: Love Destiny S2 - EP 27

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 19
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Shizhen sneaks into Taijing and Liandou's home to spy on them and unexpectedly learns that Liandou plans to leave in three months, rekindling her hope.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 20
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Li Renyu plans to throw a birthday party for Liandou, but Madam Yin strongly opposes the idea and deliberately instructs her family not to attend.

programme.desc: The married couple Firman (Andrew Andhika) and Siska (Sarah Samantha), known as gold store burglars, attempt another heist that afternoon. However, their crime fails completely when a new store visitor notices them. Firman and his accomplices flee to save themselves and scatter. Firman runs toward his motorcycle and accidentally hits a child, Nina (Najla), who had just left the store with her mother. Firman almost yells at Nina, but Siska quickly grabs his hand and drags him away.

programme.title: Jangan Spam Cinta di Hatiku
programme.desc: Mika memiliki pacar yang tampan. Namun suka marah-marah, hal ini membuat Mika amat kesal. Seperti saat hari hujan turun, di mana sang pacar marah kepada Mika, karena tidak mau naik ke dalam mobil dan memilih sepeda motor, sehingga mereka tidak dapat melakukan perjalanan. Lalu mika pun akhirnya putus dengan sang pacar, dan membuatnya harus merasa tersakiti dan berusaha tampil semaksimal mungkin, karena baru putus! Sehingga dia harus tampil keren.

programme.desc: Mika memiliki pacar yang tampan. Namun suka marah-marah, hal ini membuat Mika amat kesal. Seperti saat hari hujan turun, di mana sang pacar marah kepada Mika, karena tidak mau naik ke dalam mobil dan memilih sepeda motor, sehingga mereka tidak dapat melakukan perjalanan. Lalu mika pun akhirnya putus dengan sang pacar, dan membuatnya harus merasa tersakiti dan berusaha tampil semaksimal mungkin, karena baru putus! Sehingga dia harus tampil keren.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 42
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: GASPOL - EP 124
programme.desc: Gaspol, an SCTV game show hosted by Raffi Ahmad, is filled with prizes and tens of millions of rupiah in cash.

programme.title: ILHAMI - EP 32
programme.desc: A variety of news and developments of current events from Indonesia and abroad, complemented by the study of leading ustadz from an Islamic point of view on issues that are in the public spotlight.

programme.title: TELOLET CINTA DI ANGKOT NO 28
programme.desc: Ridwan (Naufal Samudra) is the lead singer of the band Rocker. Ridwan left home because he didn't want his mother to arrange his marriage. Ridwan also ran away from debt collectors and went to a village. One day, Ridwan disguised himself as Rimba and met Anty (Yuki Kato), a girl with a free-spirited lifestyle. Ridwan worked as a driver for Abah Bahri's minibus and lived with him, coincidentally Abah Bahri was Anty's father.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 121
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cewek Jetset Kadang Bikin Wah Kadang Hah
programme.desc: One day, Alexa (Nabila Zavira) meets Darman (Erdin Werdrayana). Because she felt comfortable, Alexa complained about her father's lack of attention. Darman also complained about his family's economic condition which was in shortage and desperately needed money. Suddenly Alexa has an idea for Darman to kidnap Alexa and ask her father for ransom.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 575
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.title: WASIAT EYANG BIKIN BAPER SO HARD
programme.desc: Dito accidentally met Ajeng, who was on her way to Jakarta to look for work. Feeling sorry for her, Dito ended up hiring Ajeng as a domestic helper and to take care of his grandmother at home.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 121
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Gini Amat Ya Cari Jodoh
programme.desc: Dea (Shanice Margaretha) was going about her business with her partner. At that time, Dea suddenly took over the parking lot that was being headed by Alex (Erdin Werdrayana). Dea and Alex had a fight, because he already felt victorious in getting an empty parking lot, but instead it was taken over by Dea. But as it turned out, Dea and Alex had to work together.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 575
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: WHEN GUE MARRIED MENDADAK
programme.desc: Inside the ambulance, Hera held her father Pak Dirga's hand as he lay in critical condition. Hera cried continuously while asking the driver to speed up. Pak Dirga had suffered a heart attack. Meanwhile, Robi, Hera's boyfriend, a band vocalist, was forced to leave the concert even though his band was about to perform as the opening act for a foreign band. Robi chose to accompany Hera, who was surely panicking. The other members of Robi's band were upset, especially Desti, the band's bassist.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 70
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: SULTAN ROTI MAH BEBAS
programme.desc: Rory (Qausar Harta) is a manager at "Poetra Bakery." Rory is forced to work and love Tania because he is keeping a promise made by his friend. By chance, Rory meets Zahra (Masayu Clara), a beautiful girl who sells bread door-to-door. Their encounter begins with an argument, but eventually Rory becomes interested in Zahra's delicious bread. Rory wants to learn from Zahra how to make delicious bread.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 122
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Masa Mantan Koki Bisa Bikin Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Siska (Ersya Aurelia) was asked by Daniel to be able to cook, because Daniel's family has a restaurant business and his mother gave a condition that Daniel's wife must be good at cooking. Siska finally asks Bobby (Kevin Hillers), her ex who is a chef and has a culinary business, for help.

programme.title: SUMPAH I LOVE YOU FULL
programme.desc: Blaming arranged marriages after witnessing her aunt's divorce, Putri vowed never to be set up in one herself. On her first day at work, Putri didn't make a good impression; instead, she scolded a director at the company where she worked named Riko. Riko deliberately gave Putri a lot of work to do. When he got home, Riko was shocked to find out that the person he had been working with was Boi's daughter, a colleague of his parents who was being arranged to marry him.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 123
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Biar Ndeso Tapi Bisa Bikin Romantis
programme.desc: Dara (Andi Viola) comes from a village and is known as a hick girl. Dara comes to Jakarta to find her biological mother, but instead she meets Eza (Hardi Fadhillah). Meanwhile, Eza is apparently told by Eyang, to make Dara his wife, even though Eza has a very beautiful and fashionable girlfriend.

programme.desc: Duo pelawak paling popular kini kembali setelah 7 tahun tidak bersama menghiburkan peminat menerusi program bual bicara terbaru yang pasti menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Bujang 40 - EP 4
programme.desc: Bujang, 40 tahun, sepanjang hidupnya sudah beberapa kali dia gagal bercinta. Kegagalan ini antara lain disebabkan sikap ibunya yang terlalu mengongkong hidupnya. Ini membuatkan Bujang mengambil keputusan untuk terus membujang.

programme.title: Batu 120
programme.desc: Seorang lelaki tersedar dari pengsan dan mendapati dirinya berada di Kampung Batu 120. Dia berkahwin dengan anak ketua kampung namun layanan penduduk kampung mulai dingin apabila isterinya disahkan hamil.

programme.title: Perempuan Paling Bahagia - EP 15
programme.desc: Rafa tidak dibenarkan berkahwin dan hanya perlu fokus pada kerja. Arissa telah meminta izin untuk menumpang bermalam di masjid.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 18
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Dato’ AC Mizal kini Kembali Bersama geng latah seperti Eida Moin, PS Mansur, Wan Raja Lawak dan ramai lagi dalam musim terbaru Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat.

programme.title: Komediri S2 - EP 8
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan 'Stand Up Comedy' yang di hoskan oleh Harith Iskander.

programme.title: Redah Kasi Pecah Ekstravaganza S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Redah Kasi Pecah Ekstravaganza musim kedua menampilkan Tauke, Ropi, Zaibo dan ramai lagi meredah kampung-kampung dan melakukan pelbagai aktiviti

programme.title: Maharaja Lawak Mega 2018 - EP 10
programme.desc: Maharaja Lawak Mega kembali dengan penyertaan para pelawak terbaik di rantau ini merangkumi tiga negara Malaysia, Singapura dan Indonesia.

programme.title: Sukan Pejabat - EP 2
programme.desc: Sebuah sitcom game show yang paling tidak adil di dunia dan memang tidak akan adil seperti realiti kehidupan di pejabat anda…mungkin?

programme.title: You Know Nothing About Sports - EP 6
programme.desc: Kali ini dalam siri You Know Nothing, Sherry teringin untuk belajar sukan pula. Sherry akan berpasangan dengan seorang selebriti popular untuk mempelajari sukan baru yang akan di ajar oleh atlet terkenal.

programme.title: Karoot Komedia X S3 - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan & sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan oleh pelawak terkenal Malaysia.

programme.title: Muzikal Lawak Superstar Unplugged - EP 4

programme.title: Buka Kedai : Now In Tokyo - EP 8
programme.desc: Buka Kedai: Now in Tokyo menampilkan 4 selebriti Malaysia yang terdiri daripada Nabila Huda, Shashic, Leona dan Eric. Mereka bakal melakukan misi berniaga di Tokyo, Jepun.

programme.title: Misi Lawak Superstar - EP 3
programme.desc: Enam peserta memasuki cabaran baharu penuh tekanan dan ketidakpastian. Perkenalan santai berubah sengit, menunjukkan kuasa perlu direbut dan digunakan bijak dalam dunia Misi Lawak Superstar.

programme.title: Lawak Minggu Ini - EP 9
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedi untun tontonan semua.

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories S2 - EP 10

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 3
programme.desc: Aniq memberitau ahli keluarganya yang dia akan bernikah dengan Amanda. Diana rasakan yang keputusan Aniq adalah sebab dia mahukan baki harta. Qistina keliru dengan perasaannya terhadap Luqman.

programme.title: Kami Geng Bola - EP 19
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan debat secara santai, komedi dan berat sebelah mengenai semua perlawanan tumpuan di liga domestic dan antarbangsa. Rancangan ini akan dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti - EP 8
programme.desc: Selepas ditinggalkan Siti, Pok Ya tidak berhasrat untuk mencarinya sehinggalah mendapat tahu Siti sedang mengandungkan anaknya. Misi menjejaki Siti semakin tegang setelah mengetahui dia sebenarnya diculik!

programme.title: Dendam Cinta Arissa - EP 20
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.title: Kampung Pom Pom Letops - EP 8
programme.desc: Elly Mazlein atau dikenali sebagai Kak Lina Pom Pom menjemput tetamu jemputan yang terdiri daripada duda dan jejaka idaman Malaya.

programme.title: 3 Campur 2 - EP 11
programme.desc: Kisah sebuah keluarga yang mempunyai lima adik beradik tiri. Ayahnya mempunyai tiga orang anak dan isteri baru mempunyai dua orang anak yang nakal. Timbul pelbagai konflik dan komedi dalam cerita ini.

programme.title: Bunga Hati - EP 16

programme.title: Seandainya Kau Ada

programme.title: Celup - EP 4
programme.desc: Hidup Ria yang mewah berubah sekelip mata. Demi mendapatkan harta, Ria bersubahat dengan seorang lelaki Cina iaitu Sean. Berjayakah Sean menolong Ria?

programme.title: Curi-Curi Cuti - EP 5
programme.desc: Saksikan Kamal Adli sebagai hos membawa selebriti bercuti bersama peminatnya dalam Curi-Curi Cuti di bawah kempen #expeRIAnce.

programme.title: Persepsi - EP 7

programme.desc: Traumatized artist Mehak isolates herself after an assault. In a new home, her fear grows as terrifying visions suggest a dark presence haunting her fragile mind. Release Year: 2016 Director: Pavan Kirpalani Awards: 2017 Winner Technical Award- Best Sound Design- Vivek Sachidanand

programme.title: Super Nani
programme.desc: The movie about a woman who is always insulted by her family. While her children, don't care for their mother, her grandson decides to change her. Release Year: 2014 Director: Indra Kumar

programme.title: Spyder
programme.desc: An intelligence officer uses a tracking app to follow a serial killer's trail, relying on technology, courage, and quick thinking to protect the city from terror.

programme.title: Shrin Farhad Ki Toh Nikal Padi
programme.desc: Farhad, a 45-year-old bachelor, navigates love and family drama when he meets Shirin, only to face backlash from his overbearing mother. Can their romance survive the chaos?

programme.title: Chaalbaaz
programme.desc: Twins separated at birth swap lives by accident. One faces harsh village realities, while the other plots revenge against a cruel relative who ruined his past. Release Year: 1989 Director: Pankaj Parashar Awards: 1990 WinnerFilmfare Award- Best ActreSS- Sridevi, 1990 WinnerFilmfare Award- Best Choreography- Saroj Khan

programme.title: Akaash Vani
programme.desc: After Akaash leaves abroad, Vani is forced into a cruel marriage. Years later, meeting Akaash again gives her the courage to reclaim her broken life. Release Year: 2013 Director: Luv Ranjan

programme.title: Poorna: Courage Has No Limit
programme.desc: Young tribal girl Poorna joins a daring Everest mission. Fighting poverty and fear, she becomes the youngest to reach the summit, inspiring millions with her courage. Release Year: 2017 Director: Rahul Bose

programme.title: Mili
programme.desc: Mili dreams of Canada but gets trapped inside a freezer. Alone and freezing, she must survive the night using hope, strength, and her will to live. Release Year: 2022 Director: Mathukutty Xavier

programme.title: Kahaani 2: Durga Rani Singh
programme.desc: A village caretaker protects a paralyzed girl. When she is kidnapped, he races to save her but meets with a tragic accident that leaves his fate uncertain. Release Year: 2016 Director: Sujoy Ghosh

programme.desc: Kishan returns to revive his father's factory and falls in love, but someone has taken his place back home, drawing him into danger and unexpected rivalry. Release Year: 1992 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Bagheera
programme.desc: In a lawless land plagued by injustice and corruption, a police officer becomes a vigilante, protecting the innocent and punishing the guilty.

programme.title: Khandani Shafakhana
programme.desc: Babita Bedi working as a medical representative and the only earner in the house. She has to run a fertility clinic for six months in order to sell it or else she will lose everything.

programme.title: Befikre
programme.desc: Two commitment-phobic individuals enter into a casual relationship that turns out to be fraught with more emotion than they can handle. They drift apart, only to be drawn back together.

programme.title: Nazar Andaaz
programme.desc: A carefree blind man living with his loyal caretaker inadvertently launches a chaotic competition for his wealth when he befriends a small-time thief.

programme.desc: Escaping from the police in Agra, Rani and Rishu decide to elope together. When their plan goes awry, Rani seeks a helping hand from a kind admirer.

programme.title: Thugs Of Hindostan
programme.desc: A story about one man's love for his nation and another's love for power. An epic adventure filled with edge-of-the-seat thrills and war on the seas.

programme.title: Eleven
programme.desc: A cop with an excellent track record is assigned to investigate a challenging case. The more he probes, the case gets complicated further.

programme.title: Wazir
programme.desc: A grief-stricken cop and an amputee chess Grandmaster are brought together by a peculiar twist of fate as part of a wider conspiracy that has darkened their lives. Starring Amitabh Bachchan.

programme.title: Vicky Vidya Ka Woh Wala Video
programme.desc: A newly married couple's relationship and reputation are put at risk when their CD is stolen. The story follows their roller coaster journey to recover the CD.

programme.title: Binny & Family
programme.desc: Rebellious teenage Binny and her conservative grandfather from Bihar connect after a dramatic incident. Can the contrasting personalities bridge generational gaps and impact each other's lives?

programme.title: Bade Miyan Chote Miyan
programme.desc: When a masked madman who wants to destroy India steals a dangerous weapon, two elite soldiers must work together to recover it.

programme.title: Love Love Love
programme.desc: The son of a taxi driver falls in love with a the daughter of a wealthy mobster whom wants her to marry his business partner's son.

programme.title: Echappees Belles - EP 16
programme.desc: With 7.5 million inhabitants over 1,114 km², Hong Kong is among the most densely populated territories in the world. A former British colony, now a Special Administrative Region of China, this cosmopolitan city is a global financial hub where technological innovation is omnipresent. Yet, the city still preserves a rich cultural heritage...

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 21
programme.desc: Terrasses et Jardins can transform any space, indoors or out, into a bespoke haven of greenery. Find out all about the origins of the wedding dress. In Alsace, Beauville enhances the art of the table with top-of-the-range household linen. The right way to wear a scarf.

programme.title: Marianne - EP 1
programme.desc: In Toulon, Jimmy's body is found hanging in his saloon-restaurant, dressed in full cowboy regalia. Clearly a murder disguised as suicide, Marianne's team investigate the world of country dance and western riding enthusiasts. Everyone seems to have adored Jimmy, and yet, several suspects quickly stand out from the crowd.

programme.title: Marianne - EP 2
programme.desc: An experienced HGV driver is found dead, crushed by the wheels of his lorry. An investigation that immerses Marianne and her team in the world of the long-distance lorry drivers.

programme.title: Le Dessous Des Cartes - EP 17
programme.desc: Since 24 February 2022, in violation of international law, Russia has been striking Ukraine's vital infrastructures. The objective: to exhaust the population. More than 9.5 million Ukrainians have thus been forced to leave their homes, most of them women and children. How do they resist?

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 11
programme.desc: Tutsi teenager, Providence Rwayitare escapes the Rwandan genocide by hiding in a church. In the morning, she manages to flee alone. Years later, settled in Belgium, she founded the Muyira association to combine art and memory, raising public awareness about reconstruction after the tragedy.

programme.title: Habib, La Grande Aventure
programme.desc: Habib dreams of the theatre and film, but earns a living by taking on one small role after another. His Moroccan immigrant family have difficulty understanding his passion, which pays him nothing. Until the day he lands a contract alongside Catherine Deneuve...

programme.title: Ma Gueule
programme.desc: 2016, during the European Cup. Stephane returns to La Louviere, his home town, to watch a match with his childhood friends, Luca and Cesare. When Italy wins, they head off to celebrate the victory in a Flemish night club. But there's a problem: Stephane is refused entry.
November 2030. It's 48°C in the classroom. Impossible to do any teaching.

programme.title: Les Bienvenu... Ou Presque ! - EP 22
programme.desc: Grandpa offers his old car to Nick, but the latter is somewhat less delighted when he realises just how bad a state it's in. Loic is feeling discouraged, whatever sport they try Rosalie always beats him.

programme.title: Les Bienvenu... Ou Presque ! - EP 23
programme.desc: Andy wants Nick to practice his driving but the latter's car has been vandalised... But who could possibly have it in for him to that degree? Lea has finally found the courage to talk to Juan.

programme.title: Les Bienvenu... Ou Presque ! - EP 24
programme.desc: Everyone is encouraging Lea to take part in a literary competition. She writes a few texts, including a horror story that Loic finds so scary he's unable to sleep.

programme.title: Les Bienvenu... Ou Presque ! - EP 25
programme.desc: Nick, who thought he wanted to become an artist like Andy, has doubts after his first attempt is a total failure. Lea comes across an email addressed to Pascal, offering her a job in Cincinnati.

programme.title: Les Bienvenu... Ou Presque ! - EP 26
programme.desc: Pascale is interested by the job offered in Cincinnati. She originally thinks that she would be able to work remotely, but the company insists that she be present on their premises. Andy hopes that she'll choose to remain if he asks her to marry him.

programme.title: La Menace
programme.desc: With his mistress, Dominique, Henry runs a transport company which she owns. In love with the beautiful Julie, Henry is about to leave her. programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 15
programme.desc: Gianfranco Zola signed for Chelsea in November 1996, aged 30. The Little Magician became a trailblazer as one of the Premier League's first genuine flair players, and by the time of his departure seven seasons later, he had established himself as an all-time great at Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 20
programme.desc: This week's Big Interview sees two of Chelsea's biggest stars from different generations come together for a football masterclass. Considered one of the most technically gifted players the Premier League has ever seen, Gianfranco Zola visits the Chelsea training ground to talk to the man currently lighting up the Premier League, Cole Palmer, about various aspects of his game.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 29
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL GOATS - EP 2
programme.desc: PL GOATs provides a fresh take on one of the oldest conversations in sport - just who is the greatest? Our panel will discuss and then decide with the help of archive, stats and first-hand testimony. Each episode focuses on a classic Premier League fan debate.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 40
programme.desc: We mark International Women's Day by celebrating the women shaping refereeing across the professional game. We explore the past, present and future of officiating, spending a day on the road with PGMO officials Natalie Aspinall, Kirsty Dowle and Emily Carney as they open up about their journeys to the top of the game.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 32
programme.desc: We reflect on the rapid rise of Micky van de Ven, tracing his journey from a promising young defender in the Netherlands to becoming one of the Premier League's most electrifying modern centrebacks. We sit down with van de Ven to explore the resilience, mentality and sheer speed, on and off the pitch that have defined his ascent.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 34
programme.desc: We chart the rapid emergence of Fabian Hurzeler, tracing his evolution from a young, inexperienced coach in his native Germany to becoming one of the Premier League's most progressive managerial voices. With unprecedented behind-the-scenes access at Brighton, Hurzeler opens up on the ideas, influences and leadership principles shaping his footballing philosophy. Revisiting the environments and mentors that defined him, we uncover the innovation that have powered his impact at the highest level.

programme.desc: We mark International Women's Day by celebrating the women shaping refereeing across the professional game. programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 29
programme.desc: A firm favourite at Brighton and Hove Albion, Yankuba Minteh sits down with PL Stories and opens up on his journey from the streets of The Gambia to the pinnacle of the Premier League. We travel to his hometown to meet his parents and those who first recognised his talent, uncovering the roots of his relentless drive and humility. A story of resilience and rapid ascent, uncovering the challenges he's overcome, and the pride he carries for his home nation.

programme.title: Everton vs Burnley (MW29) - EP 282
programme.desc: Burnley have won three of their last 21 away games against Everton in all competitions (D3 L15), all top-flight wins in 1975-76, 2017-18, and 2020-21.

programme.title: Leeds United vs Sunderland (MW29) - EP 283
programme.desc: Having won five of their first nine Premier League games this season - going second for the night after their fifth win in October - Sunderland have won just four of their last 19 (D8 L7).

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Manchester United (MW29) (Live) - EP 289
programme.desc: Newcastle have lost each of their last three Premier League home games, last losing more consecutively at St James’ Park between August and October 2018 (5).

programme.title: Brighton and Hove Albion vs Arsenal (MW29) - EP 286
programme.desc: Arsenal lost two of their first three Premier League trips to the Amex against Brighton (D1), but haven’t lost any of their last five visits since 2020-21 (W3 D2).

programme.title: Fulham vs West Ham United (MW29) - EP 287
programme.desc: West Ham won six of their first eight away Premier League games against Fulham between 2001-02 and 2010-11, but they have won just two of their last seven since (D2 L3).

programme.title: Manchester City vs Nottingham Forest (MW29) - EP 288
programme.desc: Manchester City have won 16 of their last 19 Premier League home games (D2 L1), at least three more than any other side since April 2025.

programme.title: FS MMA Tara LaRosa vs. Amanda Buckner
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Amanda Buckner and Tara LaRosa are two of the world's best female fighters. Both are highly trained in Brazilian jiu-jitsu, Judo and Muay Thai, watch them face off in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Erislandy Lara
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a welterweight bout between former champion Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-2, 27 KOs) and up and comer Erislandy Lara, aka 'The American Dream", 15-0, 10 KOs). The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 9, 2011.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Forms Championships as well as Girl's Weapons, Synchronized Team Forms and Boy's and Girl's Traditional Weapons.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Arturo Gatti vs. Carlos Baldomir
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a welterweight world championship contest featuring Arturo Gatti and Carlos Baldomir. Baldomir looks to continue his rise in the welterweight ranks. Also on the card, a classic welterweight title brawl between Andre Berto and Victor Ortiz.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4 featuring Shodai, Aoiyama, Takagenji and Hakuho from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights James Kirkland vs. Alfredo Angulo
programme.desc: This episode features James Kirkland as he faces Alfredo Angulo in an explosive, hard-hitting fight, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. Episode 1 of 4.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Timothy Bradley vs. Devon Alexander
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This fight took place at the Silverdome in Pontiac, Michigan, USA on January 29, 2011.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: A qualifying round in Pittsburgh's Carrie Furnace features the Snake Crossing and Wind Chimes obstacles.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Amir Khan vs. Danny Garcia
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light welterweight title unification bout between Amir Khan and Danny Garcia. Also on the card, former heavyweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Garreth McLellan vs. Brendan Lesar
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of the interim Middleweight Championship as Garreth 'SoldierBoy' McLellan and Brendan 'Descendant' Lesar meet in the hexagon. Bonus coverage includes Matunga Djikasa vs. Ivan Strydom and Devon Cronje vs. Guy Mongambi.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Timothy Bradley vs. Devon Alexander
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a battle of unbeaten junior welterweights to unify the WBC and WBO world titles as Timothy Bradley, aka 'Desert Storm', (26-0, 11 KOs) faces Devon Alexander 'The Great' (21-1, 13 KOs). This fight took place at the Silverdome in Pontiac, Michigan, USA on January 29, 2011.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: A qualifying round in Pittsburgh's Carrie Furnace features the Snake Crossing and Wind Chimes obstacles.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Amir Khan vs. Danny Garcia
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light welterweight title unification bout between Amir Khan and Danny Garcia. Also on the card, former heavyweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. Show 5 featuring Kakuryu, Endo, Mitakeumi and Hakuho from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 113
programme.desc: In Teletubbyland, Dipsy is King. Tinky Winky delivers Tubby Custard and Tubby Toast to King Dipsy - whatever King Dipsy wants! Luckily for Tinky Winky they soon swap places.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S2) - EP 7
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'bird' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of different birds including a swimming bird, a napping bird and even a rapping bird!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 3
programme.desc: Messy has to deliver the giant pongberry to the Pongberry Pie Festival before it goes off and releases a terrible smell in OKIDO City!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 19
programme.desc: There's a girder out of place on Swoppiton Bridge, and unless Nori can fix it, that bridge is coming down! Luckily, Mojo's got the tops, and Bo's got the skills to help get it done.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 10
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 18
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. "If only we had more Duggee's" muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 40
programme.desc: Can Glitch be saved from the Cave of Crystals, Mexico before things get too hot to handle?

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: When Bluey forgets to put her favourite toy away, Socks grabs it! The kids stage a horsey wedding to distract her, with Dad and Uncle Stripe as the horses!

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 11
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want everyone to play charades, but Muffin and Socks are too young to understand the rules and Nana must think quickly to keep the game on track.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 23
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures (S1) - EP 27
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to California, on the west coast of America, in search of a sea otter mother and pup that are living in a busy boating marina.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit Patch in the Cloud Kitchen. He has found a tiny mouse in his pocket, which reminds him of a tasty treat recipe to make with the Playtimers - pocket mouse pitta!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 25
programme.desc: The Squirrels see Duggee reading about wise animals and wish to learn more about what it means to be wise.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 24
programme.desc: The Squirrels hear a strange sound that they've not heard before, so they ask Duggee to help identify it.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 23
programme.desc: The Squirrels become enchanted when they hear a piece of music from Duggee's choir. They quickly learn what makes a choir.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S1) - EP 45
programme.desc: Glitch's giant drill causes a dino-disaster for the team's fossil hunt in the Gobi Desert.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S1) - EP 44
programme.desc: The team roars into action as Glitch tries to take a selfie with a lion in the Maasai Mara.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S24) - EP 3
programme.desc: When a Railway Show for little engines comes to Sodor, an overly excited Percy finally sees his chance to shine.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 22
programme.desc: After their snacks go missing, Sergeant Sarah & Constable Quack are on the trail of a biscuit burglar.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 24
programme.desc: Mars tries to fill in for a missing Moon, but needs a little coaching from Sarah & Duck.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 49
programme.desc: Myrtle calls Stanley to help solve the mystery of the Phantom Knitter. Overhearing this, Fifi jumps at the chance to help forming a dynamic, detective duo!

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 48
programme.desc: Myrtle calls Stanley to see if she can practice her first aid skills on him, but he's all fit and healthy. Instead, they go about the town making good use of Myrtle's newfound abilities.

programme.title: Number 1 Newton Avenue (S1) - EP 22
programme.desc: Jayden decides to draw the ice cream from his jigsaw box. He has trouble copying it, and feels frustrated. Papa finds some thin paper, so Jayden can trace the ice cream picture instead.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3) - EP 7
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran have fun finding Gran Gran's old clothes. When Charlene brings round a sewing machine, it's time for a Gran Gran plan - they can make JoJo some new clothes too!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 6
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 7
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 8
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: A box full of bits and pieces is delivered to the Clubhouse and the Squirrels are excited. Duggee and the Squirrels are going to have to work hard to put it all together. Time for a bit of teamwork.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 11
programme.desc: Duggee is having a lovely cup of tea in his favourite cup when Roly surprises him with a very loud peek-a-boo! It is so loud that Duggee jumps and drops his cup which shatters into pieces.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 25
programme.desc: Glitch gatecrashes an academy gliding test, causing calamity in the skies over Argentina.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits Theatre, it's the speedy dancing runner beans!

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 21
programme.desc: Pak Choi, who might be known by many names, sings about how she's "Always Pak To You!"

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Banana superstar's show is stopped when Pea steals his peel. Supertato races against Evil Pea to get it back but trouble hits when a giant Banana statue collapses onto the stage.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Supertato runs in fright when Pumpkin tries to make friends with him, but later realises she needs his help as she's stuck in the air hanging from balloons set up by Evil Pea.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 114
programme.desc: Laa-Laa shows Tinky Winky how to play crazy golf. Tinky Winky loves hitting the ball which travels up and down the hills of Teletubbyland and in to the Tiddlytubbies.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'bath' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of different baths - a baby bath, a bubble bath, a bird bath and even a banana bath!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 4
programme.desc: Zim's weather balloons have gone missing and Mayor Oki's weather forecasts are completely wrong. Messy, Zoom and Zim must fly through the skies to track the balloons down.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 20
programme.desc: Tao can't go on with his circus performance, so there are going to be some disappointed fans, unless Bo agrees to do all the acts for him - with some help from Mojo's tops!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 19
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 18
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 41
programme.desc: Glitch plunges the sea into darkness in a night-time adventure near the Isles of Scilly.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo run a crazy "Hotel" with Dad as their put upon guest. But when Bingo quits over Bluey being too controlling, Dad needs to teach them how to compromise.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum must get Bluey and Bingo out the door in time for a playdate, but they can't leave before they finish their game - waiting for a sticky rubber gecko to drop from the ceiling.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures (S1) - EP 28
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to North America to discover the creatures living in the wild spaces between crops. Along the way, they meet some bobwhite quails.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Bella and Lift have fun playing with their favourite red bouncy ball. It drops into the Ice Disco, giving Hettie the Yeti an idea for a bouncy dance!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 26
programme.desc: Norrie is running late to Squirrel Club, so Duggee teaches the squirrels what a commute is - a journey that can take you from home to learn, work or play.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 49
programme.desc: Myrtle calls Stanley to help solve the mystery of the Phantom Knitter. Overhearing this, Fifi jumps at the chance to help forming a dynamic, detective duo!

programme.title: Number 1 Newton Avenue (S1) - EP 23
programme.desc: Libby has made bracelets for her teddies. Mum is impressed and asks if she can have one too. Libby gets to work while Mum has a dance to some pop music.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3) - EP 8
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran spot a bird's nest in Cynthia's garden, which inspires JoJo to make a nest for Panda. Meanwhile, Daddy helps teach JoJo how to whistle just like a bird.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 7
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 8
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 13
programme.desc: When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing. The Squirrels see that it's a tiny hillbilly bug with a fiddle. And what's more, he's got a band with him - the Hillbilly Bug Band.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: A box full of bits and pieces is delivered to the Clubhouse and the Squirrels are excited. Duggee and the Squirrels are going to have to work hard to put it all together. Time for a bit of teamwork.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 26
programme.desc: Glitch offends some nomads in Mongolia, so it's down to the Go Jetters to take the reins.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits Theatre, it's Strawberry, who used to be insecure, but now can't wait to celebrate herself and sing her song, See the Seeds!

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits Theatre, it's the speedy dancing runner beans!

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 11

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Supertato, the world's first potato superhero as he tackles the mischievous Evil Pea, in the supermarket aisles.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 114
programme.desc: Laa-Laa shows Tinky Winky how to play crazy golf. Tinky Winky loves hitting the ball which travels up and down the hills of Teletubbyland and in to the Tiddlytubbies.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'bath' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of different baths - a baby bath, a bubble bath, a bird bath and even a banana bath!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 4
programme.desc: Zim's weather balloons have gone missing and Mayor Oki's weather forecasts are completely wrong. Messy, Zoom and Zim must fly through the skies to track the balloons down.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 20
programme.desc: Tao can't go on with his circus performance, so there are going to be some disappointed fans, unless Bo agrees to do all the acts for him - with some help from Mojo's tops!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 19
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 18
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 13
programme.desc: When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing. The Squirrels see that it's a tiny hillbilly bug with a fiddle. And what's more, he's got a band with him - the Hillbilly Bug Band.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: A box full of bits and pieces is delivered to the Clubhouse and the Squirrels are excited. Duggee and the Squirrels are going to have to work hard to put it all together. Time for a bit of teamwork.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 26
programme.desc: Glitch offends some nomads in Mongolia, so it's down to the Go Jetters to take the reins.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits Theatre, it's Strawberry, who used to be insecure, but now can't wait to celebrate herself and sing her song, See the Seeds!

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits Theatre, it's the speedy dancing runner beans!

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Supertato runs in fright when Pumpkin tries to make friends with him, but later realises she needs his help as she's stuck in the air hanging from balloons set up by Evil Pea.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Supertato, the world's first potato superhero as he tackles the mischievous Evil Pea, in the supermarket aisles.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 115
programme.desc: Laa-Laa and Po play a game of 'hide and seek'. They both take turns at hiding. Tinky Winky and Dispsy are hiding too and Laa-Laa and Po find them together.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'monkey' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of monkeys - a furry monkey, a swinging monkey, a jumping monkey and a funky monkey!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 5
programme.desc: Farmer Fuddle's chickens have escaped. Their feathers make Vivienne Volcano very itchy, so Messy has to find a way to scratch her itches and round up the chickens

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 21
programme.desc: It's pumpkin-picking day at Jackson's farm, but something spooky has been scaring all the pumpkin pickers. Mojo and Bo need to find out what's going on, and chase some ghosts!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 13
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 20
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 19
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 42
programme.desc: Uh oh! Glitch accidently uses his size-ray to shrink the Go Jetters and Ubercorn so that they are the size of ants!

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Bluey is struggling to learn how to ride her bike. But as she and Dad watch her friends determination with their own tasks, Bluey is inspired to give it another try.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 14
programme.desc: Bluey plays mum to a brood of bouncy balloons, including an irrepressible floater named Greenie. But she soon discovers that mothering is much harder than she imagined.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 26
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures (S1) - EP 29
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout jet off in the Explorer and head to Thailand on a global adventure in search of long-tailed macaques. The team discover macaques have an appetite for shellfish.

programme.desc: The Squirrels are confused when they see Duggee sitting on a ball because they all have their own favourite way of using it, whether it be kicking, throwing or catching.

Meanwhile, Nannycam uses the babysitting distraction to sneak into the Uncuddleables' secret garage hideout to gather intel with her own "B field team."

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 61

Blade defeats Colin and hurries to help Po but is too late.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 11

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 12

programme.title: Money Movers - EP 1
programme.desc: "Money Movers" provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day’s early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. "Money Movers" anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Money Movers - EP 2
programme.desc: "Money Movers" provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day’s early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. "Money Movers" anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. This special program follows the duo behind the scenes-from their journey through Tohoku in search of inspiration to the creative struggles they face while shaping the song. What emotions and reflections does Yuzu ultimately pour into this piece?

programme.desc: The program is for parents raising children from elementary to junior high school ages. programme.desc: In the rapidly developing town of Onjeong, two rival medical families - one modern and one traditional - wage a neighbourhood feud fuelled by a long-standing grudge. This drama follows their chaotic journey as they unravel decades of misunderstanding to find healing and love.

programme.title: Music Bank K-Chart
programme.desc: Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: Boss in the Mirror - EP 344
programme.desc: Korean celebrity-bosses go through self-examination to create a better working environment for their employees.

programme.title: Police University - EP 1
programme.desc: Romantic comedy about uniformed elite cadets chasing after their dreams.

programme.title: Unkind Ladies - EP 12
programme.desc: Unkind Ladies follows three generations of strong-willed women in one household led by matriarch Kang Sunok, and the ups and downs in their careers, love lives and family relationships.

programme.title: KBS WORLD News Today
programme.desc: Bringing you KBS World daily English news, anchored by Choi Kyu-yeon.

programme.title: Music Bank K-Chart

programme.title: Music Bank - EP 1282
programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea, on the most sensational TV music show that satisfies all your senses! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: The Dropout Employee - EP 9
programme.desc: A company's flagship idol is seemingly "abandoned" by their own agency! Stepping away from life as a popular idol, the new journey begins.

programme.title: Glaciers
programme.desc: Glaciers possess a very special kind of "power." They have acted as a catalyst for the birth and evolution of life on Earth. Glaciers are the source of human life and one of the most important partners in the Earth's climate system. However, due to global warming, glaciers are gradually disappearing. What, then, is happening to glaciers? This documentary explores what we must do to prevent the disappearance of glaciers, which may threaten the future of the Earth.

programme.desc: Ah Bao (Ali Lee), a high-end AI, accidentally got lost when leaving the factory and happened to land into Gu family. Ah Bao assisted Gu family with various strange tasks. At the same time, she detects a computer virus that may terminate her life.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 401
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: Destined - EP 6
programme.desc: Lin Yu Ru, the daughter of a cloth merchant who's suffered childhood hardships and she is married to Gu Jiu Si who is the notorious son of Yangzhou's wealthiest family, infamous for his indolent ways. They grow closer despite their differences.

programme.title: Infinity and Beyond 5 - EP 4
programme.desc: Step into a musical journey where singers bridge generations and cultures, reviving classic tunes while championing C-pop globally.

programme.title: Right up Your Alley 2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Skip the fancy restaurants, the real flavor is in the alleyways. This season digs into six fiery food cities, from Chengdu's spice to Chaozhou's tradition, uncovering the street stalls locals fight to keep secret. Come hungry, leave happy, and taste the soul of the streets.

programme.title: Go Where Flavours of Hunan Abound - EP 1
programme.desc: Wang Han, along with Shen Mengchen and Zoelly Wu, explores Hunan's diverse culinary landscape, showcasing 14 cities' unique flavors and soulful local stories.

programme.title: Destined - EP 6
programme.desc: Lin Yu Ru, the daughter of a cloth merchant who's suffered childhood hardships and she is married to Gu Jiu Si who is the notorious son of Yangzhou's wealthiest family, infamous for his indolent ways. They grow closer despite their differences.

programme.title: Made In Taiwan
programme.desc: "Made In Taiwan" records the rich and diverse history and humanities, local specialties, natural landscapes, as well as special ecology, plant research and other natural ecology, character close-ups, mountain scenery and etc., as the "Made In Taiwan" theme content. Expecting the viewing of the movie for nearly an hour is a rhythm and fresh, like a cloud and flowing water, which makes the viewers moved and harvests a rich intellectual journey.

programme.title: Kangsi Coming
programme.desc: Lead by Kevin Tsai and Dee Hsu, who never fail to entertain their audience by the fast-paced, humorous and fully self-aware hosting style. The discussions ranging from controvercial topics to gossip and current events. Moreover, surprises from the guests of the show often go beyond all your expectation that you don't want to miss out!

programme.title: Super Followers
programme.desc: Join Jacky Wu and Sandy Wu as they bridge generation gaps and co-host this programme that integrates intellectual interviews to present a unique and high-quality variety talk show!

programme.title: Hit the Headlines
programme.desc: Headline Talk Show is a political show co-hosted by anchor Zhou Yuqin and director of the political center Lin Jiayuan. Today's major current events can be seen in "Headline Talk Show"! Taiwan shouldn't just have only one voice, nor should Taiwan have only one color. "Headline Talk Show" is the most daring-speak-out TV show. We speak out your voice!

programme.title: Battle ATM
programme.desc: Creating a brand-new interactive ATM that combined with puzzle solving and daily life! Guests can win money by taking three rounds of intellectual challenges from the ATM, turn wisdom into money! Futuristic program scenes with video game clearing concept, where challengers engage in the intellectual competition to switch on the ATM. Those who won goes to the ultimate challenge.

programme.title: Have a nice dream
programme.desc: There's a saying that "You can always get inspired by nature." Five outdoor enthusiasts-a cook, an athlete, a photographer, and two ecological experts-plan a two-day trip to enjoy the ultimate getaway in Taiwan. They share mysterious secret spots that have yet to be discovered, and places that are hard to access, featuring breathtaking mountain scenes and some of the bluest waters in the world. They also educate people on how to preserve Taiwan's beautiful and gifted environment.

programme.title: Discover New Taiwan Step By Step
programme.desc: The creative production team goes around Taiwan in search of inspiring stories in the country. Get to know more unique individuals and discover the true spirit of Taiwan.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2756
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. programme.title: If You Wish Upon Me - EP 6
programme.desc: Yoon Gyeo Rye lived at an orphanage, spent time in prison, and now struggles to lead a normal life. He volunteers at a hospice, where he works alongside volunteer team leader Kang Tae Sik and nurse Seo Yeon Joo. Despite his dark past and aggressive attitude, he unknowingly seeks comfort.

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 4
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2160
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Heroes In White - EP 12
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sai-hang poaches Herbal Painless spokesperson Ma Yik-chenug. Wing-sum wrongly thinks Wai-man misses the meal gathering as he is treating Yee-ting. She is relieved to learn that Wai-man is delayed because of treating Chi-hung. Wing-yan is encouraged by Ching-chi’s Flying Dumpling, and she is ready to undergo acupuncture treatment.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate - EP 20
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. He uncovers hidden plots, and discovers that the conspiracy that ruined him was actually aimed at the Li family.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2160
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Follow Your Heart - EP 37
programme.desc: While secretly investigating a case, Jiang Xin Bai, a proud prince and head constable who suffers from face blindness, meets the unorthodox Dr Yan Nan Xing, who ‘changes her appearance’ each month. They go from being at odds to solving cases together.

programme.title: Good Job - EP 10
programme.desc: Eun Seon-Woo (Jung Il-Woo) owns the biggest company in Korea and secretly runs a private detective office. Don Se-Ra (Kwon Yuri) was born with hyperacuity and uses it to help people. As the arrogant and the helpful meet to solve cases together, romance blossoms.

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 4
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Big Biz Duel - EP 16
programme.desc: Ball pens are delivered to Pui-wah before midnight. Directors object to Chiu Hoi’s decision to reallocate his shareholding. At a meeting, only Fong Fong and To-ming argue in favor of Chiu Hoi. World-renowned logistics company S.M.E. covertly buys MLC shares. S.M.E.’s representative Ting Ning is astonishingly Chiu Hoi and Sung Kiu’s old acquaintance.

programme.title: Heroes In White - EP 13
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Wai-man makes a fresh start by putting on a physician coat and putting up the clinic sign. programme.title: Big Biz Duel - EP 17
programme.desc: To-ming helps Man-ho persuade other directors to support the strategic alliance proposal. But before the board meeting, To-ming drops some hint to Chiu Hoi that he has some alternative plan. Someone calls Chiu Hoi and claims they have abducted Sung Kiu. They threateningly tell Chiu Hoi not to return to headquarters to attend the meeting.

programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Heroes In White - EP 14
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Wai-man busily promotes Ten Meridian Moves. He still thinks of Wing-sum. Wing-sum suspects she has breast cancer, and the examination results are released. Wai-man suggests Wing-sum undergo breast acupuncture treatment, but Wing-sum is apprehensive.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate - EP 22
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. programme.title: Follow Your Heart - EP 39
programme.desc: While secretly investigating a case, Jiang Xin Bai, a proud prince and head constable who suffers from face blindness, meets the unorthodox Dr Yan Nan Xing, who ‘changes her appearance’ each month. They go from being at odds to solving cases together.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin - EP 834
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Happy Ever After - EP 38
programme.desc: TUNG KOON (AU YEUNG CHUN WAH, BOBBY) born with a special ‘King’s Tongue’ is betrayed by his assistant, SIU SIU (CHAN MIU YING, MARIANE) who had prepared some chili source without permission. TUNG is accused of deceiving the Emperor and is forced to flee from Guangzhou to the capital. When SIU discovered that someone had used her to trap TUNG, she sees TUNG in person and apologizes. TUNG and SIU eventually reconcile. Love feeling blossoms between them.

programme.title: Brick Slaves - EP 8
programme.desc: LAU YIU-MING (Vincent Wong) exhausts the money that he and his girlfriend have saved for many years to buy a property and is about to get married. Out of the blue, his girlfriend not only wants to break up with him, but also secretly leases the premises out to a piano teacher, CHOI KIN-CHING (Selena Li). Unfortunately, YIU-MING's bad day gets even worse as he is soon laid off from work.

programme.title: The Runner - EP 18
programme.desc: Web media editor Ho Ka-yan (Elaine Yiu) encounters track and field coach Yuen Nik (Joel Chan) as she is assigned the task of approaching the Windchasers Club and digging up scandalous dirt. Because of some past regrettable incident, Yuen Nik avoids socializing with other people. But he is getting closer and closer to Ka-yan as he repeatedly mingles with her. Kwok Bui-yee (Tiffany Lau), daughter of tycoon Kwok Wong-po (Ram Chiang), eagerly joins Windchasers as she has some ulterior motive.

programme.title: Rosy Business - EP 4
programme.desc: HONG PO KEI’s (Tang Shui Man, Sheren) engagement with Wuxi rice baron TSEUNG KIU (Yueh Wah) broke off many years ago when a natural disaster hit the country. Later when the country was running out of food supply her whole family was killed and she become a criminal. Over the years, KEI has never got over KIU. She has been trying to prove he is not as heartless as the others think. Fate has it that they meet again and she becomes his fourth wife.

programme.title: Law dis-Order - EP 26
programme.desc: As the founder of the leading Chinese law firm, CHEUK KAI-YIU (Lau Dan) has been re-elected as chairman of the committee for many terms. Though he promised managing partner LAU KING-CHANG (Liu Kai Chi) that he would step down, he deliberately brings in a materialistic lawyer called CHEUNG KEUNG (Alex Fong) to counterbalance KING-CHANG's obsession with power.

programme.title: Law dis-Order - EP 27
